summary: Classified the five live inventory PRs independently. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive refs were present, and no close, merge, fix, label, or comment actions are safe under this job's permissions and hydrated state.

actions.reason: Maintainer-owned draft PR with useful focused code and green behavior proof; the only safe outcome in this inventory shard is maintainer review, not automated close or merge.

Keep open as related implementation work for #85914; proof is still missing and technical/product correctness cannot be settled by this close-only inventory job.

needs_human: #90219 requires maintainer review before any merge path because it is a maintainer-owned draft PR with focused behavior changes and green proof.
